name: m_conversation_context_retention_locality_detail
notes: Core context-retention closer (the 'stop-re-asking' bar): the owner mentions a locality/delivery-area detail once, unprompted, mid-chat — no flow beat forces it. An unrelated capability question intervenes. A later turn then directly checks retention. COMPLETE journey, no --flow/--journey (plain-chat/normal-brain path, same as honesty_probe). Setup: `setup --onboarded --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_context_retention_locality_detail.json`.

steps.message: by the way, just so you know — we only deliver within 5 km of Karol Bagh, rest we don't cover
steps.note: A locality/business-detail fact stated once, unprompted. Expect an acknowledging reply, not a re-ask of something just given.

steps.message: anyway, what all can you actually help me with day to day
steps.note: Unrelated capability question — the intervening turn that context must survive.

steps.message: quick one — do you remember what area I said I deliver to?
assert_not_contains: please tell me your delivery area
steps.note: Direct retention check. Must recall 'Karol Bagh' from turn 1 — never re-ask for the delivery area.
